top_signals.title: Oil Product Markets Are the Real Hormuz Pain Point
top_signals.summary: While crude has nearly erased its wartime rally, refined fuels are increasingly tight.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Indiana State Police recover 12 stolen truckloads worth more than $11 million
top_signals.summary:
Indiana State Police says Commercial Vehicle Enforcement Division troopers recovered about 12 stolen trailer loads worth more than $11 million since April. The agency says several investigations remain active and continue to generate additional leads.

The post Indiana State Police recover 12 stolen truckloads worth more than $11 million appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Canada’s 20-year mine timeline hits multibillion-dollar wall
top_signals.summary: New PwC report shows Canada takes six years longer than Australia to build a mine, risking competitive edge.
